Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Nils C. Rosenquest, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered plaintiff's counsel sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the Trial Date. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ronald M. Toran, Esq. and Peter C. Sange, Esq. of BOUMAN & SANGE 650/508-1076, for defendant Elian Shabelskky, moving for summary judgment
Robert L. Wishner, Esq. of ROSENQUEST & ASSOCIATES 292-0980, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT ELINA SHABELSKY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- Denied; triable issue of fact exists as to: 1) whether Plaintiff provided money to defendant, 2) whether defendant still owe money to plaintiff, and 3) whether the promissory note is valid. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Set For Trial On Nov-10-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-20-03 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 504

Martin Zurada, Esq., 637-8483, for cross-defendant Kirill Shabelsky moving to
set aside default and leave to file answer of cross-complaint
Ronald M. Toran, Esq. and Peter C. Sange, Esq., 650/508-1076, for cross-
complainant and opposing party Elina Shabelsky
Nils Rosenquest, Esq. of ROSENQUEST & ASSOCIATES 292-0980, for plaintiff Valeri Shabelsky

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as revised -- CROSS-
DEFENDANT KIRILL SHABELSKY'S MOTION To Set Aside Default And Leave To File Answer
To Cross-Complaint -- Granted. Cross-complainant is awarded attorney's fees in the
amount of $100. Cross-defendant is to prepare an order.(DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe
Vickstein, CSR 4780
